<a id="class-slider"></a>

# Slider

**Inherits:** [Range](class_range.md#class-range) **<** [Control](class_control.md#class-control) **<** [CanvasItem](class_canvasitem.md#class-canvasitem) **<** [Node](class_node.md#class-node) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

**Inherited By:** [HSlider](class_hslider.md#class-hslider), [VSlider](class_vslider.md#class-vslider)

Abstract base class for sliders.

## Description

Abstract base class for sliders, used to adjust a value by moving a grabber along a horizontal or vertical axis. Sliders are [Range](class_range.md#class-range)-based controls.

## Signals

<a id="class-slider-signal-drag-ended"></a>

**drag_ended**(value_changed: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool)) [🔗](#class-slider-signal-drag-ended)

Emitted when the grabber stops being dragged. If `value_changed` is `true`, [Range.value](class_range.md#class-range-property-value) is different from the value when the dragging was started.

---

<a id="class-slider-signal-drag-started"></a>

**drag_started**() [🔗](#class-slider-signal-drag-started)

Emitted when the grabber starts being dragged. This is emitted before the corresponding [Range.value_changed](class_range.md#class-range-signal-value-changed) signal.

---

## Enumerations

<a id="enum-slider-tickposition"></a>

enum **TickPosition**: [🔗](#enum-slider-tickposition)

<a id="class-slider-constant-tick-position-bottom-right"></a>

[TickPosition](#enum-slider-tickposition) **TICK_POSITION_BOTTOM_RIGHT** = `0`

Places the ticks at the bottom of the [HSlider](class_hslider.md#class-hslider), or right of the [VSlider](class_vslider.md#class-vslider).

<a id="class-slider-constant-tick-position-top-left"></a>

[TickPosition](#enum-slider-tickposition) **TICK_POSITION_TOP_LEFT** = `1`

Places the ticks at the top of the [HSlider](class_hslider.md#class-hslider), or left of the [VSlider](class_vslider.md#class-vslider).

<a id="class-slider-constant-tick-position-both"></a>

[TickPosition](#enum-slider-tickposition) **TICK_POSITION_BOTH** = `2`

Places the ticks at the both sides of the slider.

<a id="class-slider-constant-tick-position-center"></a>

[TickPosition](#enum-slider-tickposition) **TICK_POSITION_CENTER** = `3`

Places the ticks at the center of the slider.

---

## Property Descriptions

<a id="class-slider-property-editable"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **editable** = `true` [🔗](#class-slider-property-editable)

-  **set_editable**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_editable**()

If `true`, the slider can be interacted with. If `false`, the value can be changed only by code.

---

<a id="class-slider-property-scrollable"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **scrollable** = `true` [🔗](#class-slider-property-scrollable)

-  **set_scrollable**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_scrollable**()

If `true`, the value can be changed using the mouse wheel.

---

<a id="class-slider-property-tick-count"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **tick_count** = `0` [🔗](#class-slider-property-tick-count)

-  **set_ticks**(value: [int](class_int.md#class-int))
- [int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_ticks**()

Number of ticks displayed on the slider, including border ticks. Ticks are uniformly-distributed value markers.

---

<a id="class-slider-property-ticks-on-borders"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **ticks_on_borders** = `false` [🔗](#class-slider-property-ticks-on-borders)

-  **set_ticks_on_borders**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **get_ticks_on_borders**()

If `true`, the slider will display ticks for minimum and maximum values.

---

<a id="class-slider-property-ticks-position"></a>

[TickPosition](#enum-slider-tickposition) **ticks_position** = `0` [🔗](#class-slider-property-ticks-position)

-  **set_ticks_position**(value: [TickPosition](#enum-slider-tickposition))
- [TickPosition](#enum-slider-tickposition) **get_ticks_position**()

Sets the position of the ticks. See [TickPosition](#enum-slider-tickposition) for details.

---

## Theme Property Descriptions

<a id="class-slider-theme-constant-center-grabber"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **center_grabber** = `0` [🔗](#class-slider-theme-constant-center-grabber)

Boolean constant. If `1`, the grabber texture size will be ignored and it will fit within slider's bounds based only on its center position.

---

<a id="class-slider-theme-constant-grabber-offset"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **grabber_offset** = `0` [🔗](#class-slider-theme-constant-grabber-offset)

Vertical or horizontal offset of the grabber.

---

<a id="class-slider-theme-constant-tick-offset"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **tick_offset** = `0` [🔗](#class-slider-theme-constant-tick-offset)

Vertical or horizontal offset of the ticks. The offset is reversed for top or left ticks.

---

<a id="class-slider-theme-icon-grabber"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **grabber** [🔗](#class-slider-theme-icon-grabber)

The texture for the grabber (the draggable element).

---

<a id="class-slider-theme-icon-grabber-disabled"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **grabber_disabled** [🔗](#class-slider-theme-icon-grabber-disabled)

The texture for the grabber when it's disabled.

---

<a id="class-slider-theme-icon-grabber-highlight"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **grabber_highlight** [🔗](#class-slider-theme-icon-grabber-highlight)

The texture for the grabber when it's focused.

---

<a id="class-slider-theme-icon-tick"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **tick** [🔗](#class-slider-theme-icon-tick)

The texture for the ticks, visible when [tick_count](#class-slider-property-tick-count) is greater than 0.

---

<a id="class-slider-theme-style-grabber-area"></a>

[StyleBox](class_stylebox.md#class-stylebox) **grabber_area** [🔗](#class-slider-theme-style-grabber-area)

The background of the area to the left or bottom of the grabber.

---

<a id="class-slider-theme-style-grabber-area-highlight"></a>

[StyleBox](class_stylebox.md#class-stylebox) **grabber_area_highlight** [🔗](#class-slider-theme-style-grabber-area-highlight)

The background of the area to the left or bottom of the grabber that displays when it's being hovered or focused.

---

<a id="class-slider-theme-style-slider"></a>

[StyleBox](class_stylebox.md#class-stylebox) **slider** [🔗](#class-slider-theme-style-slider)

The background for the whole slider. Affects the height or width of the [grabber_area](#class-slider-theme-style-grabber-area).
